title: Archive-aware cell lookup: readCell/cellFile fallback + listCells active-scope + regression net
action: Add the archive store primitive layer WITHOUT any CLI verb yet. (a) Freeze a regression net FIRST: extend test_lib.mjs to assert current listCells/readCell/readyCells/depsAllCapped behavior over a fixture (byte-stable), green before touching the functions (crit-pattern 20260714). (b) Add cellsArchiveDir(root,feature)=.bee/cells/archive/<feature>/; make cellFile(root,id) and readCell(root,id) fall back to the archive tree when the active file is absent (search archive/*/<id>.json) so dep-resolution (depsAllCapped) and review runPreflight resolve archived cells transparently. (c) listCells(root,{includeArchived=false}) scans only .bee/cells/ by default (the speedup); includeArchived:true also folds archive. Mirror into .bee/bin/lib/cells.mjs byte-identical (test_lib_mirror). No status/CLI change in this cell.

truths: A new/extended regression net in test_lib.mjs pins current listCells+readCell+readyCells+depsAllCapped behavior and is green BEFORE the function edits (net-first).

readCell(root,id) and cellFile resolve a cell from .bee/cells/archive/<feature>/<id>.json when it is absent from .bee/cells/ — so depsAllCapped and reviews.runPreflight still find archived capped cells.
listCells default scans only the active .bee/cells/ dir; includeArchived:true additionally includes archived cells; both return the same sorted shape as today for non-archived cells.
Full verify (run_verify.mjs) green; no status/CLI behavior changed yet.
prohibitions: Do NOT add a CLI verb or change bee status counts in this cell.
Do NOT change listCells output shape/sort for existing (non-archived) cells.
Do NOT let readCell fallback change behavior when no archive dir exists (byte-identical to today).

trace.verification_evidence: {"red_failure_evidence":"Before: readCell(root,id) only reads .bee/cells/<id>.json; listCells only scans .bee/cells/. If a capped cell were moved to an archive dir, depsAllCapped (per-id readCell) and reviews.runPreflight (throws on missing cell) would break — an archived dep would make a dependent cell permanently unclaimable, and a review scoping an archived cell would hard-fail. No archive-aware lookup existed.","green_evidence":"After: cellsArchiveDir(root,feature)=.bee/cells/archive/<feature>; readCell falls back to .bee/cells/archive/*/<id>.json when absent from active dir (dep-resolution + review preflight now resolve archived cells transparently); resolveCellFile returns the real on-disk path; listCells default scans only active dir (the speedup), includeArchived:true folds archive, archive/ subdir never mistaken for a cell. Byte-identical to today when no archive dir exists (verified: no archive dir present, full suite green). Regression net frozen green BEFORE the edit (crit-pattern 20260714): 413 pass unchanged → 416 pass after. Mirror byte-identical (test_lib_mirror). Independent run_verify EXIT=0 30.3s."}
trace.verify_output: ORCH_VERIFY_EXIT=0 wall=30328ms (independent). Mirror cells.mjs == .bee/bin/lib/cells.mjs IDENTICAL. No archive dir yet → readCell/listCells byte-identical to pre-change. Net-first: worker 413→416 pass before/after.
